title: Probe: sequential process + dated milestones
note: Authored probe with known ground truth. Text can always be summarised into a text slide; the value of AI generation is recognising content that deserves a specialised layout a human would find laborious to build. This source contains an explicit five-step sequence where order is load-bearing, and a set of dated milestones.
licence: Authored for this suite; MIT with the repository.

expectedSlideTypes.because: five numbered intake steps where each must complete before the next
dated programme milestones from March 2024 to December 2026
pilot outcome figures: 11.4 to 3.2 days, 31% to 9%, 3.1 to 4.4

expectedCharacteristics: Uses a process layout for the five-step sequence rather than a bulleted list
Uses a timeline layout for the dated milestones
Keeps the ordering constraint (validation before triage) visible
